reason: Acceptance source of truth for verifying MVP coverage, round-trip fidelity, and out-of-scope boundaries.
Verification reference for public API contracts, equality semantics, resource lifecycle, and raw() behavior.
Checklist for phase-specific validation commands, review gates, and expected test coverage.
Audit exception behavior against the custom DocxException rules and raw() carve-out.
Audit fluent API style, content equality, testing expectations, and banned implementation shortcuts.
Verify wrapper/delegate behavior, no-cache policy, and zero POI leakage outside raw().
Verify package placement and public/internal boundary conformance.
Check for duplicated mapping/adapter logic and missed abstraction opportunities during review.
Check that api/, builder/, and internal/ responsibilities remain cleanly separated.
